content.boundary: Applies only to the admissions mechanism (exam design, weighting of grades/recommendations, tutoring-sensitive content) for existing 6-/8-year tracks; excludes abolishing or restructuring the tracks themselves, consistent with the Minister's stated position.
content.change_lever: Regulatory/administrative reform of the centrally organized entrance-examination process (grades, teacher recommendations, exam design) under Act CXC of 2011, without altering the track's grade-span structure.
content.name: Preserve tracks, reform admissions mechanism (Lannert-style procedural reform)
content.system_problem: SES predicts access to early-selective tracks independently of prior test scores, more strongly than in other OECD countries, and entrance depends substantially on private tutoring rather than raw ability, despite identical per-pupil public financing.
